ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reporting_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of the agency (e.g., government, private) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the agency record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the agency record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, XML) */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the data type record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting frequency */,
  "reporting_period" TEXT /* Period for which the data is reported (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the reporting frequency record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the reporting frequency record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_timings" (
  "timing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting timing */,
  "timing_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting timing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting timing */,
  "reporting_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for reporting the data */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the reporting timing record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the reporting timing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting agency */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was reported */,
  "report_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting frequency */,
  "report_timing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting timing */,
  "data_details" TEXT /* Detailed financial data, including various metrics and indicators */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File containing the financial data */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., pending, valid, invalid) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_report_timing_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_timing_id") REFERENCES reporting_timings ("timing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES reporting_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_report_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_frequency_id") REFERENCES reporting_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial indicator */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial data entry */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the financial indicator */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial indicator */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the indicator */,
  "warning_threshold" REAL /* Warning threshold for the indicator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the indicator record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress test */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial data entry */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of stress test (e.g., exchange rate, liquidity, credit risk) */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the stress test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the stress test */,
  "test_scenario" TEXT /* Scenario used for the stress test */,
  "test_results_file" TEXT /* File containing the stress test results */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the stress test record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the stress test record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_tests_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, analyst, auditor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial indicator */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the alert record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES financial_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record where the change was made */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field where the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
